title: Lava Chicken (Movie Edition)
description: Replaces the in-game version of Lava Chicken with the version from the movie.
body:
A meme pack that replaces Hyper Potion's version of Lava Chicken with the version of the track from the movie (Specifically the officially recorded version, found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xzx0V1JUI88). If your language is set to English (US) then it will also change the credit from Hyper Potions to Jack Black.

I did also try and change it for the other versions of English as well, but the 1.21.8 game files don't include other languages for some reason (which is extra annoying considering I play the game with British English enabled smh)
